title: Two Bateaux Off-Course in the Fog
description: Tallmadge's latest return shows two bateaux unaccounted for—their loads are not confirmed as landed on the Manhattan side. Glover believes they overshot the Cortlandt slip in the thickening fog and grounded somewhere north of the intended landing point. The men aboard are almost certainly safe, but the boats are out of rotation until they are redirected, and their manifested troops cannot be counted as crossed until confirmation arrives. The missing count creates a gap in Washington's running tally.
